title: eriogonum saxatile
intro: Eriogonum saxatile, also known as rock buckwheat, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Eriogonum saxatile can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves.
